title: The Siege of Vareth
description: The Compact's allied forces besieged Vareth for forty days. Aran Voss, twenty-three years old, had taken command of the city after his father's death on the third day. The siege was broken not by military force but by a flood that cut the supply lines. Both sides called it luck.
consequences: Aran Voss established as ruler of Vareth
Northern Reach survived as a political entity
The Compact retreated but was not defeated
